dsl_rule.translation_notes: Pattern uses Donchian channels to define resistance (upper band) and support (lower band). Entry requires: price touches/breaks above resistance (dc_upper), then reverses and pulls back below previous high, then finds support above the lower band (dc_lower) before rebounding. Exit when price breaks below support (dc_lower). Source data shows 6.26-7.51% average rise for upside breakouts. Stop loss set conservatively at 2% given high success rate.

Exit when price breaks below support (dc_lower). Source data shows 6.26-7.51% average rise for upside breakouts. Stop loss set conservatively at 2% given high success rate.

source_rule_text: Pattern name: Congestion/Support and Resistance - Price trends, touches overhead resistance, reverses, and returns to support zone before rebounding
